headline: Constellation Energy, Li Auto And Carvana Are Among Top 11 Large Cap Gainers Last Week (Sept 16-Sept 20): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?
summary: Fed's rate cut boosts tech, construction, industrial, machinery & financial sectors. 11 top performers last week - are they in your portfolio?

headline: As Apple's iPhone 16 Goes On Sale, Analyst Says Demand Off To Strong Start Keeping Cupertino On Track To Hit $4T Market Cap
summary: Apple bull Daniel Ives is bullish about the iPhone 16 which he believes would kickstart a super-cycle, thereby pushing up volume.

headline: Putin Ally Who Unveiled Tesla Cybertruck With Machine Gun Last Month Now Says Elon Musk 'Remotely Disabled' The Militarized EV
summary: Chechen warlord Ramzan Kadyrov has leveled accusations against Tesla owner Elon Musk, claiming that his Cybertruck was remotely disabled by Musk.

headline: Consumer Tech News (Sept 15-Sept 21): Russian Cyber-Influence Operations Targeting Harris–Walz campaign, Apple Raises Price For Battery Replacement & More
iPhone 16 Demand, EU Regulations, And Expansion Plans: This Week In Appleverse
summary: Apple has faced a mixed week, with concerns over lower-than-expected iPhone 16 demand, strong sales reported by T-Mobile, increased regulatory scrutiny from the EU, and expansion plans in India as part of its strategy to diversify production away from China.

headline: Elon Musk And Nvidia CEO Share Vision Of AI-Powered Personal Assistants, LinkedIn Under Scrutiny And More: This Week In AI
summary: The past week in tech highlighted predictions of AI-powered surveillance by Oracle's Larry Ellison, personal digital assistants envisioned by Elon Musk and Nvidia's CEO, scrutiny over LinkedIn's use of user data for AI training, warnings about AI's impact on jobs, and Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff's criticism of Microsoft's Copilot.
